text:
# Carcavelos Forecast – Tuesday 26 May

**Small but fun—light winds make this a quality morning session.**

**MORNING (03:22–11:00):** Waves holding at 1.3m with clean 9.8s WNW swell. Light NE/ENE winds stay under 12km/h until 10:00, keeping shape crisp. **Best window: 05:00–09:00** when winds are lightest and water temps climb from 19°C to 22°C. Expect waist-to-shoulder sets with manageable offshore influence.

**AFTERNOON (12:00–18:00):** Swell eases fractionally to 1.2m, but winds flip to gentle ESE/S, staying under 7km/h until 17:00—nearly glassy conditions 13:00–16:00. Waves persist at 1.3m through sunset (17:46). Water temps hit 27°C by 14:00.

**Tips:** Fish or fun board; this ain't power territory. Dawn patrol beats the growing crowds. Afternoon slot best for precision maneuvers and longer rides. Wind swing to WSW at 17:00 marks session end.
